title: Cucumber Salad
description: Thinly sliced cucumbers and red onion in a sweet-and-tangy white wine vinegar dressing, showered with fresh dill and chives — a cooling, refreshing summer side.

items: ½ large red onion, very thinly sliced
Chopped fresh chives, optional, for garnish

instructions: In a large bowl, toss together the cucumber, onion, vinegar, honey, and salt. Chill for 20 minutes.
Transfer to a serving bowl, leaving any excess water behind. Sprinkle with the dill and chives, if desired. Season with several grinds of pepper and serve.

notes.label: Less soggy
notes.text: Chilling the dressed cucumbers for 20 minutes draws out their water — transfer to a clean bowl and leave the released liquid behind.

notes.label: Regular cucumbers
notes.text: If using regular cucumbers instead of English, peel them and scoop out the seeds before slicing.

notes.label: Storage
notes.text: Best the day it's made; leftovers keep in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days.
